_comment: Promo codes advertised on the daily 5-star review posts. Managed HERE, not in the scheduled task. Add/edit/remove entries freely. A promo is advertised only while active and within its date window, and only on the properties it applies to. property keys: 'carriagehouse', 'natchezvictorian', or 'all'. checkout_by = last date a qualifying stay may check out (the code stops being advertised after this date). valid_from is optional (when to START advertising). terms is an optional human phrase the post may weave in.
